subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thy mercy hath verily preceded all, Thy favor hath been perfected, and Thy gift hath been consummated unto those who have acknowledged Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد سبقت رحمتک و تمت نعمتک و کملت موهبتک علی الذین اعترفوا بوحدانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @prayer for forgiveness
